---
title: "About"
subtitle: "The methodology, the author, the mission"
image: profile.png
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/marios-choudetsanakis/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/machoude
---

```{=html}
<div style="max-width:580px;margin:0 auto 2rem;">
  <div style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:0.68rem;color:#1DB954;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:1rem;">
    About this project
  </div>
```

**DataScouteR** is a football analytics platform that applies statistical modelling and empirical backtesting to evaluate transfer decisions across 25+ European leagues.

```{=html}
</div>

<div style="max-width:580px;margin:0 auto;background:rgba(230,57,70,0.06);border:1px solid rgba(230,57,70,0.15);border-radius:8px;padding:1.1rem 1.3rem;">
  <div style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:0.62rem;color:#E63946;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.5rem;">Honest caveats</div>
  <p style="font-size:0.8rem;line-height:1.6;color:rgba(240,244,255,0.55);margin:0;">
    The model ranks players statistically. It cannot account for injury history,
    tactical system fit, psychological adaptation, or contract terms.
    Empirical probabilities are only reliable when the backtest sample for a given tier exceeds 20 transfers.
  </p>
</div>
```
